title: Partner commitment letter – Funding to support skills development and training-to-employment for Indigenous people - Skills and Partnership Fund - Canada.ca
content:
## Partner commitment letter – Funding to support skills development and training-to-employment for Indigenous people - Skills and Partnership Fund
From: Employment and Social Development Canada
Partner commitment letter [ TXT - 2.3 KB ]
[Partner’s Letterhead] [Date] [Partner  Name] [Street  Address] [Community,  Province/Territory Postal Code]
To [Skills  and Partnership Fund (SPF) Applicant Organization]:
On behalf  of [Partner Name], I am pleased to send this letter of commitment to [SPF  Applicant Organization].
The  [Partner Name] commits to the following role in the proposed project: [please  clearly describe the partner's role in the proposed project].
The  [Partner Name] is pleased to confirm a financial contribution of $X comprised  of a cash contribution of $X, provided directly to the project, and an in-kind  contribution of $X. the value of the in-kind contribution has been calculated  as follows: [provide a breakdown of the in-kind contributions; examples of  value calculations are provided below]:
- Wages,  MERCs and Benefits for an Administrative Assistant: $35,000 per year x 2 years  = $70,000
- Project  office rent: $3,000 per month x 2 years = $72,000
- Participant  wage subsidies: 20 participants x $10 per hour x 80 hours = $16,000
- Half  of the $10,000 per participant tuition rate: 20 participants x $5,000 =  $100,000]
[If  applicable:] The [Partner Name] will also provide employment opportunities for  participants who successfully complete the required training and meet the  necessary standards, as specified in the [SPF Applicant Organization's]  proposal:
[Xx] jobs  as [position title] [Xx] jobs  as [position title] [Xx] jobs  as [position title]
[If  applicable (employer partners only):] The [Partner Name] commits to providing a  respectful and inclusive workplace for participants and improving Indigenous  cultural awareness within the organization.
We look  forward to participating in the development and promotion of this project.
[Signature] [Name and  title of person authorized to make financial and human resource commitments on  behalf of the partner]

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
